description: Fixtures for new product-business workflows (2 per workflow, 12 total)

input.problem_space: New users struggle to find value in first session of project management tool
input.user_segment: Freelancers and small agency owners (2-10 person teams)
input.business_context: D1 activation rate is 25%, target is 40%

input.problem_space: Enterprise customers need advanced permissions and audit capabilities
input.user_segment: IT administrators at companies with 500+ employees
input.business_context: Enterprise deals stalling due to security compliance gaps

input.research_objectives: Understand why 60% of trial users don't complete onboarding
input.target_users: Trial users who signed up in last 30 days but didn't activate

input.research_objectives: Validate demand for real-time collaboration features before building
input.target_users: Active users who use the product daily (power users)

input.feature_backlog: 15 features across onboarding, collaboration, and integrations themes
input.strategic_goals: Increase activation by 15% and expand to enterprise segment
input.data_sources: PostHog analytics, 20 user interviews, sales feedback

input.feature_backlog: 8 features remaining after major launch plus 5 new requests from enterprise pilot
input.strategic_goals: Convert enterprise pilots to paid contracts

input.launch_scope: Major v2 release with redesigned dashboard, new API, and pricing changes
input.target_audience: Existing customers (migration) and new mid-market prospects

input.launch_scope: New real-time collaboration feature for existing product
input.target_audience: Active users on Pro and Enterprise plans

input.analysis_focus: Feature parity and differentiation in mid-market segment
input.market_context: Growing mid-market with increasing competition from Notion and Linear

input.competitor_list: 3 niche vertical-specific tools and 2 horizontal platforms
input.analysis_focus: Market entry feasibility and positioning for healthcare vertical
input.market_context: Healthcare IT spending growing 12% YoY, compliance requirements increasing

input.strategic_goals: Grow ARR from $5M to $12M, expand to enterprise, improve retention to 95%
input.initiative_backlog: 25 initiatives across product, platform, and growth themes
input.resource_constraints: 12 engineers, 3 designers, 2 PMs for next 2 quarters

input.strategic_goals: Maintain growth trajectory, address enterprise blockers, improve NPS
input.initiative_backlog: 12 carry-over initiatives plus 8 new requests from QBR
input.resource_constraints: Same team, 2 engineers on loan to platform team
